name: Angela Schoellig
exact_department: Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) & Electrical & Computer Engineering (ECE)
sub_directions: Robust control for agile aerial robots
recent_papers: Learning-based Model Predictive Control for Safe and Agile Quadrotor Flight
Human-in-the-Loop Shared Control for Teleoperated Robots with Learned Task Models
Safe Learning-based Control for Systems with Unknown Dynamics
interest_paragraph: As a prospective graduate student with a strong interest in robotics and experience with AI agents, I am particularly drawn to Professor Schoellig's work in learning-based control and safe autonomy. Her research on topics such as 'Learning-based Model Predictive Control for Safe and Agile Quadrotor Flight' and 'Human-in-the-Loop Shared Control for Teleoperated Robots' directly aligns with my aspirations to develop intelligent and robust robotic systems. I am eager to contribute to projects that combine advanced control theory with machine learning, especially within the context of safe and interactive robotic applications.
